caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on the front, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a podcast studio. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features vertical banners with "HUSTLE" and star graphics, and red text that reads "BOSS TALK 101." In the bottom corners of the scene, logos for "FIRST TAKE 101 PODCAST" are visible, along with smaller text that reads "First Take 101". Across the sequence, the man remains seated in the same position, facing slightly to the left. He appears to be speaking, with his facial expression shifting slightly as he talks into the microphone. The camera remains static, capturing the scene from a medium shot throughout the clip.
